'''shanudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ufufuyane|ufufuyane]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ufufuyane|ufufuyane]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shanudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shænidhith|shænidhith]] || [[word:shænidhij|shænidhij]] || [[word:shænidhish|shænidhish]] || [[word:shænidhi|shænidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shanunudhuth|shanunudhuth]] || [[word:shanunudhuj|shanunudhuj]] || [[word:shanunudhush|shanunudhush]] || [[word:shanunudhu|shanunudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanudhuth|shanudhuth]] || [[word:shanudhuj|shanudhuj]] || [[word:shanudhush|shanudhush]] || [[word:shanudhu|shanudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanufdhuth|shanufdhuth]] || [[word:shanufdhuj|shanufdhuj]] || [[word:shanufdhush|shanufdhush]] || [[word:shanufdhuf|shanufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shanudhuthu|shanudhuthu]] || [[word:shanudhuju|shanudhuju]] || [[word:shanudhushu|shanudhushu]] || [[word:shanudhuku|shanudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shanudhuth|shanudhuth]] || [[word:shanudhuj|shanudhuj]] || [[word:shanudhush|shanudhush]] || [[word:shanudhu|shanudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shanudhuthul|shanudhuthul]] || [[word:shanudhujul|shanudhujul]] || [[word:shanudhushul|shanudhushul]] || [[word:shanudhukul|shanudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shanudhuthuthu|shanudhuthuthu]] || [[word:shanudhujuju|shanudhujuju]] || [[word:shanudhushushu|shanudhushushu]] || [[word:shanudhuku|shanudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shanudhuthun|shanudhuthun]] || [[word:shanudhujun|shanudhujun]] || [[word:shanudhushun|shanudhushun]] || [[word:shanudhukun|shanudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shanudhuthuoro|shanudhuthuoro]] || [[word:shanudhujuoro|shanudhujuoro]] || [[word:shanudhushuoro|shanudhushuoro]] || [[word:shanudhukuoro|shanudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
